_doc: SOURCE — security & privacy policy. Projected to the app (the dev server applies `headers` globally) and ENFORCED by gates: check_owasp_static (static, every build), security_probe (dynamic, against the running app), check_privacy (DPDP/data-protection). DEFERRED items are auth-dependent (we wire auth LAST); they are tracked in memory + light up when auth lands. Edit here, not in code.

headers.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; frame-src 'self'; frame-ancestors 'self'

owasp.A01_broken_access_control: DEFERRED to auth — RLS + RBAC + IDOR checks light up with auth
owasp.A02_crypto: TLS in transit (platform); at-rest encryption (Postgres/Supabase); PII columns flagged in privacy.classification
owasp.A03_injection: services use parameterized canonical fields (no string-concat SQL); input rejected as 422 on bad type
owasp.A04_insecure_design: the spine: every rule is source-declared + gated; no un-gated path to prod
owasp.A05_misconfiguration: global security headers (above); uploads served octet-stream + attachment + nosniff + sandbox CSP
owasp.A07_authn_failures: DEFERRED to auth — session/cookie hardening + CSRF + auth-bypass probe
owasp.A08_integrity: reproducibility receipt (gen_manifest) + drift gate; generated surface is DO-NOT-EDIT
owasp.A09_logging: audit_events entity exists; wire security events when auth lands
owasp.A10_ssrf: outbound calls are pinned kernels (email/pincode/storage); no user-controlled URLs fetched server-side

deferred_auth_last: RLS policies per table (gen_db) — need roles/actor wired
RBAC enforcement — check_access: every entity action traces to a role
IDOR / object-level authorization probe — need real identities
auth-bypass probe — protected routes return 401 without a token
session/cookie hardening (HttpOnly + Secure + SameSite) + CSRF tokens

privacy.data_localization: Supabase Mumbai / ap-south-1 — personal data resident in India
children_data_rules: verifiable parental/guardian consent before processing a child's data (students.consent_obtained must be true)
no behavioural tracking or targeted advertising to children
data minimisation — collect only what the olympiad requires
deferred_enforcement: ENFORCE consent at student create — block unless consent_obtained=true (a gen_rules guard)
erasure endpoint — cascade student -> results/certificates (right to be forgotten)
retention sweep job — purge data past retention_days

hardening_backlog: column-level / at-rest encryption verification for PII (production)
signed + expiring upload URLs + per-object access control
